Table, sort & selection.question: F3.3 checkbox scope?
Table, sort & selection.answer: Full UI wiring (checkboxes + select-all header + shift-click range + 'N selected' count), no batch action in Phase 2

Table, sort & selection.question: State management (revisits D-20)?
Table, sort & selection.answer: Plain useState (keep D-20 discipline); revisit Phase 4+ if overrides span panels

Analyzer module shape.question: Location + input?
Analyzer module shape.answer: src/core/analyzer.ts (pure-TS core), takes raw PeakRecord[] from sampler

Analyzer module shape.question: Output shape?
Analyzer module shape.answer: Enriched DisplayRow with preformatted labels (originalSizeLabel, peakSizeLabel, scaleLabel, sourceLabel) PLUS raw numbers for sorting

Analyzer module shape.question: Forward-layer for future phases?
Analyzer module shape.answer: Nothing beyond F3 — no stubs for Phase 4/5/6 fields

Analyzer module shape.question: Relationship to src/main/summary.ts?
Analyzer module shape.answer: summary.ts delegates to analyzer; analyzer owns fold+sort+format. SkeletonSummary.peaks[] type changes PeakRecordSerializable→DisplayRow. DebugPanel removed (D-16: 'replaced by GlobalMaxRenderPanel').

Search / filter behavior.question: Fields searched?
Search / filter behavior.answer: Attachment name only — strict F3.2 interpretation

Search / filter behavior.question: Debounce?
Search / filter behavior.answer: None — filter on keystroke; retrofit if Phase 9 profiling shows jank

Search / filter behavior.question: UX bits?
Search / filter behavior.answer: All four: clear (✕) button, <mark> match highlight with bg-accent/20 text-accent, 'No attachments match "<query>"' empty-state row, ESC clears focus + query
